mapper.select: select concat(trim(d.his_id), '|', trim(fm.his_charge_item_id)) as pairKey, sum(ifnull(gdi.qty, 0)) as qty from gz_dep_inventory gdi join fd_department d on d.id = gdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = gdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (gdi.del_flag = 0 or gdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' and gdi.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and concat(trim(d.his_id), '|', trim(fm.his_charge_item_id)) in #{pk} group by trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id)

select concat(trim(d.his_id), '|', trim(fm.his_charge_item_id)) as pairKey, sum(ifnull(sdi.qty, 0)) as qty from stk_dep_inventory sdi join fd_department d on d.id = sdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = sdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (sdi.del_flag = 0 or sdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' and sdi.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and concat(trim(d.his_id), '|', trim(fm.his_charge_item_id)) in #{pk} group by trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id)
